base.name: AI Fundamentals
base.description: Understand modern AI — models, safety, governance, and societal impact. The foundational knowledge that informs everything you build.

topics.title: Models & Architecture
topics.summary: How modern AI models work — from transformers to multimodal foundation models.

children.title: Large Language Models
children.summary: Comprehensive overview of LLMs: architecture, pretraining, scaling laws, context windows, frontier and open-source models.

children.title: Transformers
children.summary: Deep dive into the transformer architecture: self-attention, positional encoding, feed-forward layers. From 'Attention Is All You Need' to modern variants.

children.title: Open-Source Models
children.summary: Survey the open-source ecosystem: Llama, Mistral, Gemma, Phi, DeepSeek, Qwen. Capabilities, licensing, deployment requirements.

children.title: Computer Vision
children.summary: Vision transformers, diffusion models, VLMs, 3D understanding. The evolution from CNNs to multimodal foundation models.

children.title: Image Generation
children.summary: Diffusion model architectures. Compare Stable Diffusion, DALL-E, Midjourney, Flux on quality, speed, controllability.

children.title: Speech & Audio AI
children.summary: Speech recognition (Whisper), text-to-speech, voice cloning, music generation. Real-time and on-device capabilities.

topics.title: Safety & Alignment
topics.summary: Ensuring AI systems are safe, fair, and aligned with human values.

children.title: AI Safety
children.summary: Overview of alignment research: RLHF, Constitutional AI, interpretability, red teaming, scalable oversight. Near-term and long-horizon concerns.

children.title: Bias in AI
children.summary: How AI encodes and amplifies biases: documented examples, evaluation methods, mitigation. Accessible to non-technical readers.

children.title: AI and Privacy
children.summary: Training data, user data practices, inference attacks, surveillance. Differential privacy, federated learning, regulations.

children.title: Misinformation
children.summary: Deepfakes, synthetic media, detection methods. Technical and institutional approaches to preserving trust.

topics.title: Governance & Policy
topics.summary: The regulatory and geopolitical landscape shaping AI development worldwide.

children.title: AI Regulation
children.summary: Major regulations worldwide: EU AI Act, US executive orders, China's rules. Comparing approaches and enforcement.

children.title: AI and Copyright
children.summary: Training data copyright, AI-generated content ownership, key court cases (NYT v. OpenAI, Getty v. Stability), emerging frameworks.

children.title: AI Geopolitics
children.summary: US-China competition, chip export controls, talent flows, compute sovereignty. How AI reshapes international power.

topics.title: Society & Impact
topics.summary: How AI is reshaping work, education, creativity, and the economy.

children.title: Future of Work
children.summary: Task-level automation, job displacement research, augmentation vs. replacement, new roles. Practical advice for professionals.

children.title: AI and Education
children.summary: AI tutoring, curriculum reform, assessment redesign, digital literacy. How learning is changing at every level.

children.title: Creative AI
children.summary: AI's impact on music, film, writing, visual arts. Economic disruption, new tools, copyright debates, artist adaptation.

children.title: AI Economics
children.summary: How AI companies make money: API pricing, subscriptions, enterprise. Unit economics of inference, why AI is getting cheaper.

children.title: History of AI
children.summary: From Turing to ChatGPT: key breakthroughs, AI winters, deep learning revolution, the generative AI explosion.

topics.title: Industry Applications
topics.summary: Applied AI across sectors — real-world deployments and outcomes.

children.title: Healthcare AI
children.summary: AI in healthcare: diagnostic imaging, drug discovery, clinical decision support, FDA approvals, real-world outcomes.

children.title: AI in Finance
children.summary: Algorithmic trading, fraud detection, credit scoring, risk assessment. Regulatory considerations.

children.title: AI in Science
children.summary: AlphaFold, materials discovery, climate modeling, mathematical conjecture. How AI is changing scientific methodology.

children.title: Climate AI
children.summary: AI across the climate stack: energy grids, carbon capture, weather forecasting, sustainable agriculture.

children.title: Robotics
children.summary: LLMs meet robotics: RT-2, vision-language-action models, manipulation, the path to general-purpose robots.

topics.title: Reference
topics.summary: Foundational resources for understanding the AI landscape.

children.title: How AI Works
children.summary: Non-technical explanation of modern AI: training, neural networks, language models. After reading this, a layperson understands what's inside ChatGPT.

children.title: AI Glossary
children.summary: Plain-language definitions of the 100 most important AI terms: LLM, fine-tuning, hallucination, token, agent, embedding, and more.

children.title: AI Learning Path
children.summary: Structured path from AI beginner to practitioner: prerequisites, courses, projects, milestones. For self-directed learners.

children.title: Key AI People
children.summary: Who's who: major labs, key researchers, influential voices. A map of the people and organizations shaping AI.

children.title: Landmark AI Papers
children.summary: The 25 most influential papers (Attention Is All You Need, GPT, diffusion, RLHF, etc.) with summaries and why they matter.

children.title: AI Communities
children.summary: Guide to the AI community: conferences (NeurIPS, ICML), meetups (AIC), online forums, newsletters, podcasts.
